name: chaunyoms
description: Authoritative OMS memory and contextEngine substrate plugin for OpenClaw.

scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:compiled
scripts.qa:baseline: npm run eval:memory && npm run benchmark
scripts.check: npm test && npm run eval:memory && npm run benchmark && npm audit --omit=dev
scripts.eval:locomo: npm run eval:locomo:build && node dist/src/evals/run-eval-suite.js --suite artifacts/evals/locomo-medium-suite.json --report-prefix locomo-medium-eval-report
